_doc: Layer inventory for the Meiosis Atlas. Round-1 stub plus three layers migrated from genome-atlas on 2026-05-19 (crossover_track, prdm9_motif, nco_gc_track). The migrated layers are CONTRACT-ONLY (not-yet-loaded); pages render '⚪ not loaded' chips. Paths use the meiosis-atlas-relative `data/` root rather than `data/annotation/` (genome's old prefix) — when the actual pedigree CO/NCO pipelines emit output, point the layer paths at the real dirs via master_config roots + auto_index.
_round1_status: Three layers declared. All CONTRACT-ONLY. Phase C wires crossover_track + prdm9_motif (optional) for crossovers_per_candidate page; nco_gc_track for nco_per_candidate page. Layers carrying `_optional: true` are facultative — the consuming page hides the corresponding panel rather than erroring.
_migration_note_2026_05_19: crossover_track, prdm9_motif, and nco_gc_track migrated from genome-atlas/atlases/genome/registries/data/layers.registry.json. They belong to the Meiosis Atlas because they describe meiosis events keyed by inversion candidate, not assembly/annotation features. Layer paths shortened from `data/annotation/crossovers/...` → `data/crossovers/...` since the meiosis-atlas data layout is fresh and doesn't need the `annotation/` ancestor.

crossover_track._path_doc: Per-inversion-candidate file. The renderer interpolates `candidate_id` from shared.candidate; the layer registry never enumerates the directory.
crossover_track._feeds: crossovers_per_candidate sex-specific CO ideogram + CO-rate-vs-telomere-distance curve (phase C); also feeds Genome Atlas page3 (chromosome overview) CO-density sub-track via cross-atlas reference — that consumer reads the meiosis-owned layer from this atlas's registry.
crossover_track._schema: see crossovers_per_candidate spec — { candidate_id, candidate_span{chrom,start_bp,end_bp}, flank_bp?, events[{chrom,pos_bp,sex,indiv?,in_span?}], telomere_curve?, curve_params? }

prdm9_motif._path_doc: Embedded as `prdm9_motif` on the same per-candidate crossover JSON — no separate file. The pointer here is kept for the layers-registry chip.
prdm9_motif._feeds: crossovers_per_candidate sequence-logo card — auto-hidden when pwm is null/missing
prdm9_motif._source_pipeline: MEME / STREME on CO ±2 kb hotspots in the candidate flank
prdm9_motif._schema: { pwm: N×4 ACGT PWM | null, tool, evalue, n_hotspots }

nco_gc_track._path_doc: Per-inversion-candidate file. Separate from crossover_track because the pedigree NCO/GC detector emits a distinct table.
nco_gc_track._feeds: nco_per_candidate tract ideogram + tract-rate-vs-telomere-distance curves (NCO green / GC yellow)
nco_gc_track._schema: see nco_per_candidate spec — { candidate_id, candidate_span{chrom,start_bp,end_bp}, flank_bp?, tracts[{chrom,start_bp,end_bp,kind∈nco|gc,indiv?,in_span?}], telomere_curve?, curve_params? }

layers._cross_atlas_exports_doc: The three layers below back the cross_atlas.exports declarations in manifest.json. Contract-only — produced by the interchromosomal page (in-session compute via the ngsTracts STEP_TRC_02 traversal + the family-aware permutation null).

coincidence_matrix_v1._path_doc: Per focal-inversion coincidence matrix (2D per-window-pair C = r12/(r1*r2)). Produced by the interchromosomal page when the user selects a focal inversion.
coincidence_matrix_v1._doc: Coincidence (C) heatmap per focal inversion. Headline output of the interchromosomal page. Cross-atlas: inversion embeds this on candidate_focus as a meiosis-context tile.

inversion_meiosis_effects_v1._path_doc: Per focal-inversion effects table (intra + inter chromosomal rows from the focal_meiosis_scan + interchromosomal pages combined).
inversion_meiosis_effects_v1._feeds: interchromosomal page summary + cross-atlas to inversion + evolution
inversion_meiosis_effects_v1._doc: Per-inversion meiosis effects. Combines intrachromosomal (focal_meiosis_scan output) + interchromosomal (interchromosomal page output) into one per-focal-inversion table. Cross-atlas: inversion embeds on candidate_focus; evolution reads as a feature on archaeology_card.

chromosome_meiosis_events_v1._path_doc: Per-chromosome event list (CO + DCO + NCO classified) — the canonical denormalised view of crossover_track + nco_gc_track.
chromosome_meiosis_events_v1._feeds: crossovers + nco pages summary tiles + cross-atlas to inversion
chromosome_meiosis_events_v1._doc: Per-chromosome event list. Joined output of ngsTracts CO/DCO/NCO classifier across all candidates on a chromosome. Cross-atlas: inversion overlays as a meiosis-event count chip on the catalogue.
